articles.title: ICE officers soon will help with airport security unless Democrats end shutdown, Trump says
articles.description:
“I look forward to moving ICE in on Monday, and have already told them to, ‘GET READY.’ NO MORE WAITING, NO MORE GAMES!”

The post ICE officers soon will help with airport security unless Democrats end shutdown, Trump says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ICE officers may assist with Boston airport security starting Monday, March 25.
Trump urges action to end government shutdown affecting airport operations.
Local travelers could face increased security measures if shutdown continues.

articles.title: Former FBI Director Robert Mueller, who investigated Russia-Trump campaign ties, dies
articles.description:
Mueller was maligned throughout the two-year investigation by Trump, who regularly derided it as a “witch hunt.”

The post Former FBI Director Robert Mueller, who investigated Russia-Trump campaign ties, dies appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Former FBI Director Robert Mueller passed away, impacting national discussions on political investigations.
Mueller, known for the Russia-Trump campaign investigation, faced significant public scrutiny during his tenure.
His death may influence ongoing debates about accountability and transparency in government investigations.

articles.title: Trump threatens attacks on Iranian power plants if Tehran fails to open the Strait of Hormuz
articles.description:
Iran warned early Sunday that any strike on its energy facilities would prompt attacks on U.S. and Israeli energy and infrastructure assets.

The post Trump threatens attacks on Iranian power plants if Tehran fails to open the Strait of Hormuz appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump threatens Iranian power plants if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed.
Iran warns of retaliatory strikes on U.S. and Israeli assets if attacked.
Potential conflict could disrupt oil supply, impacting Boston's energy prices.

articles.title: She’s running Boston for patients ‘rebuilding their lives step by step’
articles.description:
Lina Sinisterra Mazariegos is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for Spaulding Rehabilitation Hospital.

The post She’s running Boston for patients ‘rebuilding their lives step by step’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lina Sinisterra Mazariegos will run the 2026 Boston Marathon for Spaulding Rehabilitation Hospital.
Her efforts aim to support patients rebuilding their lives after rehabilitation.
Funds raised will directly benefit local Boston residents receiving care at Spaulding.

articles.title: Israeli settlers smash cars and set fires in attacks on Palestinians in the West Bank
articles.description:
The official Palestinian news agency WAFA reported attacks in at least six communities on Sunday.

The post Israeli settlers smash cars and set fires in attacks on Palestinians in the West Bank appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Israeli settlers attacked six Palestinian communities in the West Bank on March 19.
Settlers smashed cars and set fires, escalating tensions in the region.
Boston residents with ties to the area may face increased concerns over safety.

articles.title: Six injured after floor collapses at NH wedding venue
articles.description:
Investigators believe the building “was over capacity” prior to the floor collapse, a spokesperson said in a release.

The post Six injured after floor collapses at NH wedding venue appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Six people were injured after a floor collapse at a New Hampshire wedding venue.
Investigators reported the building was likely over capacity at the time of the incident.
Boston residents should be aware of safety regulations at local event venues.

articles.title: Bruins beat the Red Wings 4-2 in an Eastern Conference wild-card showdown
articles.description:
The Bruins host Toronto on Tuesday night.

The post Bruins beat the Red Wings 4-2 in an Eastern Conference wild-card showdown appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins secured a 4-2 victory against the Red Wings on March 22.
This win strengthens Bruins' position in the Eastern Conference wild-card race.
Bruins will host the Toronto Maple Leafs on Tuesday night, impacting local fans.
